_source: ADX Bank General Policy & Customer Charter

about.name: ADX Bank
about.disclaimer: ADX Bank is NOT a real bank. This is a demonstration platform built for learning and portfolio purposes.

customer_support.hours: Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM IST
customer_support.resolution_time: All grievances resolved within 7 working days

data_privacy.data_usage: Data is used only for banking operations and risk management
data_privacy.data_retention: Customer data retained for 7 years post account closure as per RBI norms
data_privacy.third_party_sharing: Data is not shared with third parties except as required by law
data_privacy.right_to_erasure: Customers may request data deletion after account closure

security.password_policy: Minimum 8 characters with at least one uppercase, one number, and one special character
security.otp_policy: All sensitive actions require OTP verification sent to registered email
security.session_expiry: JWT sessions expire after 30 minutes of inactivity
security.failed_login: Account is temporarily blocked for 1 hour after 3 consecutive failed login attempts
security.password_reset: Password reset link expires in 15 minutes

prohibited_activities: Using the account for illegal activities
Sharing login credentials with third parties
Attempting to hack or manipulate the banking system
Creating multiple accounts with the same identity

interest_rates_savings.savings_account: 3.5% per annum on daily closing balance

charges_and_fees.transfer_charges: Zero — all intra-bank transfers are free
charges_and_fees.add_money_charges: Zero — no charges for adding money
charges_and_fees.loan_processing_fee: 1% of loan amount, deducted at disbursement
